reproduction.trace:
conftest.client fixture imports create_app from repaired wsgi.py (exists). create_app(project_store=mock, identity_auth=mock_resolve→{freelancer_id:'freelancer-repro-7f3a'}) → _AppHandle(_injected_wsgi). project_store.list.return_value=[{id:'proj-null-rate-001',billable_rate:None,...}]. client.get('/projects', headers={'Cookie':'session=repro-sess-9b2e4d1c; Path=/'}) → _TestClient extracts HTTP_COOKIE='session=repro-sess-9b2e4d1c'. _injected_wsgi: PATH_INFO='/projects', method=GET, session_token='repro-sess-9b2e4d1c'. _InjectedProjectMgmtAdapter.handle_request: identity_auth.resolve_session('repro-sess-9b2e4d1c')→{freelancer_id:'freelancer-repro-7f3a'}; project_store.list('freelancer-repro-7f3a')→[null_rate_project]; _rate_str(None)→'—' (null guard present); renders '
  • Zero-Rate Engagement — USD —
    • '; status=200. Assertions: response.status_code==200 PASS; 'Zero-Rate Engagement' in body PASS; '—' in body PASS.

regression.scope_basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 scoped to BLAST_RADIUS _ProjectManagementAdapter._render — rated-project rendering (billable_rate='95.00' string → float coercion) + project CRUD; production singleton _project_mgmt_adapter unchanged path

results.trace: AC6 visible (3 tests) + held-out (3 tests) all traced against repaired wsgi.py. _rate_str('95.00')=f'{float(95.00):.2f}/hr'='95.00/hr': create POST→201, 'Gamma Design' in list PASS; edit→302, 'Gamma Redesign'+'110.00' in list PASS; delete→302, 'Gamma Design' not in list PASS. Held-out: _rate_str('18000')='18000.00/hr': Zeta Analytics create/list PASS; edit Zeta Analytics Pro/20000 PASS; delete PASS. No test required editing. float() coercion on string rate preserves prior behavior. Repair scoped to BLAST_RADIUS — no skeleton test touched.

skeleton_fidelity.note: Bugfix edits BLAST_RADIUS src file (src/freelancer_app/wsgi.py, symbol _ProjectManagementAdapter._render) — sanctioned repair (H14). No frozen oracle test edited or re-run. Inherited greens verified at skeleton-build/S4-build; re-running here not required (delta Rule 4).
